skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video generation agent that creates short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions and uploaded media assets.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate AI video generation API client that uses shell scripts to interact with the pexo.ai service. Static analysis detected 534 pattern matches primarily due to the intentional API client design (external commands for API calls, network access to pexo.ai, config file access). All detected patterns are documented features of this video generation service. No malicious intent, exfiltration patterns, or obfuscation was found. The skill's functionality requires external command execution and credential access to operate.

high_findings.title: Intentional External Command Execution
high_findings.description: The skill uses shell script execution for API interactions. Commands are hardcoded for interacting with the pexo.ai video generation service. No command injection vectors exist as all arguments are validated and hardcoded.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: All external commands are hardcoded with no user input in command arguments. The skill is designed as an API client requiring shell execution for curl calls.

high_findings.title: Credential Access via Environment Variables
high_findings.description: The skill requires PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL environment variables for authentication. These are documented requirements for the video generation service.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Environment variable access is explicitly documented as a skill requirement. No credential exfiltration detected - keys are used only for authentication to pexo.ai.

high_findings.title: Heuristic: Code Execution + Network + Credential Access
high_findings.description: Static analysis flagged the combination of code execution, network access, and credential access as suspicious. However, this is the intentional design of an API client that creates videos by calling an external service with authentication.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The heuristic detected the expected API client pattern. No exfiltration, no data sent to third parties beyond pexo.ai, and no obfuscation detected.

medium_findings.title: System Health Check (pexo-doctor)
medium_findings.description: The pexo-doctor.sh script performs system reconnaissance including disk space checks, runtime availability verification, and configuration validation. This is legitimate diagnostic functionality.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: System checks are performed by a diagnostic script to verify prerequisites. No malicious reconnaissance patterns detected.

medium_findings.title: Configuration File Access
medium_findings.description: The skill reads from ~/.pexo/config file for API credentials. This is a documented requirement for the video generation service.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Configuration file access is explicitly documented. No unauthorized file access detected.

low_findings.title: MD5/SHA1 Usage Flagged as Weak Crypto
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged MD5/SHA1 usage as 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. These are used for file hashing in the upload process, not for security-critical purposes.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Hashing algorithms are used for file content identification, not authentication or security. This is standard practice for file upload systems.

low_findings.title: Temp File Creation
low_findings.description: The skill creates temporary files during the upload process. This is expected behavior for file upload functionality.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Temp files are used for processing uploads and are cleaned up after use. No sensitive data stored insecurely.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Service URLs
low_findings.description: Hardcoded URLs to pexo.ai domain. All network calls go to the intended video generation service.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to pexo.ai which is the documented service endpoint. No unauthorized network destinations detected.

dangerous_patterns.title: API Client Pattern (False Positive)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analysis detected 'code execution + network + credential access' heuristic. This pattern represents the intentional design of an API client, not malicious behavior.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The skill functions as an API client which inherently combines these elements. No malicious exfiltration or unauthorized data transmission detected.

content.value_statement: Creating professional short videos requires specialized skills and software. This skill connects Claude directly to Pexo AI video generation, enabling users to produce product ads, social content, and brand videos without leaving their workflow.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions
Create videos from uploaded images, videos, or audio assets
Handle multi-turn conversations with the AI video generator for revisions
Present preview options and collect user selections for final output
Support multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) for different platforms
Deliver final videos with downloadable URLs and project links
limitations: Requires valid Pexo API key with sufficient credits
Cannot generate videos longer than 120 seconds
May require clarification questions for vague requests
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes per clip

use_cases.title: Create Product Demo Videos
use_cases.description: Upload product images and receive professional demo videos. Ideal for e-commerce sellers, Shopify merchants, and product marketers who need quick promotional content.

use_cases.title: Generate Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Create TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts from text prompts. Perfect for content creators and social media managers who need fresh video content daily.

use_cases.title: Produce Brand Video Assets
use_cases.description: Generate brand videos and explainer content for marketing campaigns. Suitable for marketing teams and agencies managing multiple client accounts.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a 30-second product video for my handmade candles. Show them burning with soft ambient music.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner friendly - just describe what you want

prompt_templates.title: Video with Uploaded Assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Here is my product photo: [attach image]. Create a 15-second promotional video showcasing the product with energetic music.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you have existing media to include

prompt_templates.title: Style-Specific Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 60-second explainer video about our SaaS tool. Use clean animations, modern design, and a professional voiceover feel.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need specific style or tone

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Part Video Series
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 10-second intro video for our channel with our logo animation, then a 20-second product showcase clip.
prompt_templates.scenario: For complex video projects requiring multiple clips

output_examples.input: I want a 20-second video of a running shoe on a track with the sun setting in the background.
output_examples.output: Your video is ready! Download link: [video URL] Project page: [link] Would you like any revisions?

output_examples.input: [User uploads product image] Make a promotional video for this shoe.
output_examples.output: Video submitted to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. Track progress: [link] Preview options will be shown when ready.

best_practices: Be specific about video duration and aspect ratio when starting
Upload reference images when you have specific visual requirements
Review the project page periodically for AI clarification questions
anti_patterns: Do not add creative instructions the user did not request - let Pexo handle the cinematography
Do not specify technical parameters like frame rates or codecs - this is handled automatically
Do not retry failed requests immediately - wait for credit status clarification first

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: Pexo supports MP4 output with aspect ratios 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Instagram Reels), and 1:1 (Instagram posts). Video length can be 5 to 120 seconds.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Standard video generation takes 15-20 minutes. Complex requests or high server load may extend this time. You will be notified of progress updates.

faq.question: What happens if my credits run out?
faq.answer: The skill will detect credit-related errors and guide you to purchase additional credits at pexo.ai. You can retry after adding credits.

faq.question: Can I revise a video after it is generated?
faq.answer: Yes. You can request revisions by describing what changes you want. Pexo will generate new options for you to review.

faq.question: Do I need to upload my own images?
faq.answer: No. You can describe what you want in text and Pexo will generate visuals. However, uploading reference images helps ensure accurate results.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: The skill will respond in whatever language you write in. You can request videos in any language and Pexo will accommodate the request.
